ddls:
CREATE TABLE "anole_species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the anole lizard species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "island_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the island where the species is found */,
  "ecomorph_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ecomorph type of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat of the anole lizard species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anole_species_ecomorph_id FOREIGN KEY ("ecomorph_id") REFERENCES ecomorphs ("ecomorph_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anole_species_island_id FOREIGN KEY ("island_id") REFERENCES islands ("island_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "islands" (
  "island_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each island */,
  "island_name" TEXT /* Name of the island */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the island */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate type of the island */,
  "geographical_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates (latitude and longitude) of the island */,
  "island_area" REAL /* Area of the island */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the island */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("island_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ecomorphs" (
  "ecomorph_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ecomorph */,
  "ecomorph_name" TEXT /* Name of the ecomorph */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ecomorph */,
  "detailed_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the ecomorph */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ecomorph_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "morphological_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species the measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who took the measurement */,
  "svl" REAL /* Snout-vent length of the lizard */,
  "pci_limb" REAL /* Principal component 1 of limb length */,
  "pcii_head" REAL /* Principal component 2 of head size */,
  "pciii_padwidth_tail" REAL /* Principal component 3 of pad width and tail length */,
  "pciv_lamella_num" REAL /* Principal component 4 of lamella number */,
  "awesomeness" REAL /* Index of awesomeness (a behavioral trait) */,
  "hostility" REAL /* Index of hostility (a behavioral trait) */,
  "attitude" REAL /* Index of attitude (a behavioral trait) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_morphological_measurements_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES anole_species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_morphological_measurements_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES principal_investigators ("investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator leading the project */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Funding agency for the research project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the research project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES principal_investigators ("investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "principal_investigators" (
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each principal investigator */,
  "investigator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the principal investigator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the principal investigator */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the principal investigator is affiliated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the principal investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research project the dataset belongs to */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the dataset is released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_datasets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, institution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the dataset (e.g., API, web interface) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES project_datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the data file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES project_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research project the publication is associated with */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the publication was published */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* List of authors for the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations for the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_publications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)
